title: Don't let bad taste ruin your restaurant: 9 herbal tinctures for restaurateurs
description: Curcuma longa tinctures are made from the rhizome of the turmeric plant, which contains a powerful compound called curcumin. This natural anti-inflammatory helps with bad taste by reducing inflammation in the mouth and throat. The constituents in Curcuma longa tinctures, such as essential oils and flavonoids, have antibacterial properties that prevent the growth of bacteria that cause bad breath and unpleasant tastes. If you have bad taste, take a few drops of Curcuma longa tincture in...
